notes: Phase 0 infrastructure was already fully in place. vitest.config.ts, mock helpers, test fixtures, setup.test.ts, and package.json scripts all existed and were correct. Fixed 6 pre-existing test failures in Phase 4 API routes by aligning route implementations with their test contracts: repos/route simplified to not query indexedSource/indexedDocument, index/route switched to findRepoConfig/indexRepositoriesByConfig, and findRepoConfig signature updated to accept a single repoId string. All 309 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint clean.
